title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament, advancing to the next round.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn: Neighbors Demand Closure
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident in a year, prompting residents to call for the hotel's closure.
